users.title: User
users.description: Exhaustive user profile with biographical, research, and creative credentials

fullName.description: Full legal name or artist credential

selectedSection.description: The primary administrative macro-section of interest

selectedSubsection.description: The specialized sub-discipline under the selected macro-section

avatarUrl.description: The public locator URL pointing to the user's graphical avatar/photo

biography.description: Full formal biography or statement of intent

specialization.description: Specific research focus or primary focus

type.description: Whether the user is registered as an Author (creative) or a general Visitor

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles indexed by UID for granular permissions
